message:
Running command: # Good - clean removal. Now do a final port-vs-DEF check
python3 -c "
import re
with open('/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v') as f:
    content = f.read()
" 2>/dev/null || python3 -c "
import re
with open('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v') as f:
    content = f.read()
ports = re.findall(r'\b(?:inout|input|output)\s+(?:\[[\d:]+\]\s+)?(\w+)\s*[,)]', content)
with open('/tmp/def_pins.txt') as f:
    def_pins = set(l.strip() for l in f)
missing = [p for p in ports if p not in def_pins]
print(f'Wrapper ports: {len(ports)}')
print(f'NOT in DEF: {len(missing)}')
for p in missing:
    print(f'  {p}')
"

# Good - clean removal. Now do a final port-vs-DEF check
python3 -c "
import re

    content = f.read()
" 2>/dev/null || python3 -c "
import re
with open('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v') as f:
    content = f.read()
ports = re.findall(r'\b(?:inout|input|output)\s+(?:\[[\d:]+\]\s+)?(\w+)\s*[,)]', content)
with open('/tmp/def_pins.txt') as f:
    def_pins = set(l.strip() for l in f)
missing = [p for p in ports if p not in def_pins]
print(f'Wrapper ports: {len(ports)}')
print(f'NOT in DEF: {len(missing)}')
for p in missing:
